title: Assistant Store Manager - Sports Authority India Capital India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Sports Authority India Capital India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Sports Authority India Capital India! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Sports Authority India Capital India:
Sports Authority India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sports Authority India Capital India!
